name: Hokuriku Gas Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokuriku Gas Co.,Ltd. engages in the gas business in Japan. The company produces, sells, and supplies gas to approximately 440,000 customers in Niigata, Nagaoka, Sanjo, Kashiwazaki, and Kamo cities, as well as in Tagami town and Kariwa village. It also undertakes gas construction contracts; and sells gas equipment. The company was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.
